title: Train Layout + Free Printable

body:
Jack is obsessed with trains. Our friends kids' know how much Jack loves trains and thought it would be fun for all of us to go to Travel Town before they had to go back to school. I had to make a video and a layout to correspond with the fun excursion. While making the page, Ann-Marie took some photos to give you a behind the scenes look at what it's like when I shoot one of my YouTube videos in the studio. As I was doing the project, I realized I hadn't yet done SeaLemon's summer challenge, so I took that into consideration while making the page too. And since others may have children with train obsessions, I thought it would be fun to offer a free printable as well. At least three goals were accomplished in one video!

For the free printable, you can either right click on the image below, or click here to download.

Here is the video from our fun little field trip, and where you can see how my finished layout along with some souvenirs I collected came together on this colorful page.
